# CHANGE_SUMMARY_2026-04-20

## What was added
- Full preproduction folder structure
- Merged audit report, execution plan, and TODO
- End-to-end traceability layer:
  - documentation trace log
  - evidence register
  - coverage matrix
  - accuracy validation report
  - master documentation index

## What is now guaranteed
- Clear trace of what documentation was ingested.
- Clear trace of what runtime evidence was captured.
- Explicit separation of VERIFIED vs PARTIAL vs PENDING.
- No hidden assumptions in final package.

## What is still pending for final "101% accurate" sign-off
- Complete service-by-service functional validation evidence.
- Backup restore drill evidence on both servers.
- Full documented-config vs live-config conformity matrix.
- Mail deep diagnostics evidence package.

## Where to start now
1. `preproduction/MASTER_DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md`
2. `preproduction/reports/PREPRODUCTION_AUDIT_MERGED.md`
3. `preproduction/todo/PREPRODUCTION_TODO.md`
